name: PISPL.IN
message: [AI generated] PISPL.IN, also known as Patel Integrated Logistics Ltd, is a comprehensive logistic service provider. Based in India, the company offers a diverse range of innovative supply chain solutions including land transport, air freight, ocean freight, warehousing, and logistics services. PISPL's portfolio also spans e-commerce logistics, cross-border services, and last-mile delivery, all supported by advanced technological systems.
